user_query: I want to invest in the cryptocurrency market and need a comprehensive overview including cryptocurrency information, forex data, and Saudi Aramco equity data.

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest information on all cryptocurrencies including name, slug, icon class, symbol, price, market cap, 24-hour volume, total volume, change in the last 24 hours, and change in the last 7 days.
Fetch the forex information for the USD-EUR pair including current exchange rate and trends.
Fetch the performance details of the forex major currency pairs.
Fetch the latest equity data for Saudi Aramco including its stock price and market performance.
